# programs.cursor

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.cursor`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.cursor.argvSettings` | `absolute path or JSON value` | Configuration written to Cursor's {file}`argv.json`. This can be a JSON object or a path to a custom JSON file. |
| `programs.cursor.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Cursor. |
| `programs.cursor.mutableExtensionsDir` | `boolean` | Whether extensions can be installed or updated manually or by Cursor. Mutually exclusive to programs.cursor.profiles. |
| `programs.cursor.package` | `null or package` | The code-cursor package to use. Version of Cursor to install. |
| `programs.cursor.profiles` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | A list of all Cursor profiles. Mutually exclusive to programs.cursor.mutableExtensionsDir |
| `programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.enableExtensionUpdateCheck` | `null or boolean` | Whether to enable update notifications for extensions. Can only be set for the default profile, but it applies to all profiles. |
| `programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.enableMcpIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to integrate the MCP servers config from {option}`programs.mcp.servers` into {option}`programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.userMcp`. Note: Settings defined in {option}`programs.mcp.servers` are merged with {option}`programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.userMcp`, with Cursor settings taking precedence. |
| `programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.enableUpdateCheck` | `null or boolean` | Whether to enable update checks/notifications. Can only be set for the default profile, but it applies to all profiles. |
| `programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.extensions` | `list of package` | The extensions Cursor should be started with. |
| `programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.globalSnippets` | `JSON value` | Defines global user snippets. |
| `programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.keybindings` | `absolute path or list of (open submodule of (JSON value))` | Keybindings written to Cursor's {file}`keybindings.json`. This can be a JSON object or a path to a custom JSON file. |
| `programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.languageSnippets` | `JSON value` | Defines user snippets for different languages. |
| `programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.userMcp` | `absolute path or JSON value` | Configuration written to Cursor's {file}`mcp.json`. This can be a JSON object or a path to a custom JSON file. |
| `programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.userSettings` | `absolute path or JSON value` | Configuration written to Cursor's {file}`settings.json`. This can be a JSON object or a path to a custom JSON file. |
| `programs.cursor.profiles.<name>.userTasks` | `absolute path or JSON value` | Configuration written to Cursor's {file}`tasks.json`. This can be a JSON object or a path to a custom JSON file. |
